PRODUCT PAGES MADE TO CONVERT
Topic Progress:
In this lesson, we're going to take a look at product pages. These pages are the most
important part of your website because they get the most traffic. They basically serve as
a landing page for your product. I'll walk your through some page tips and strategies to
boost sales on your page.
Product Page Tips
Have a video that goes with the product images
Have the video drawing from the customer survey
Enable reviews and include number of reviews
Add features and benefits
What's included + tech specs
Think: "what are the reasons they wouldn't buy"
Have money back guarantee and free shipping pop-ups
Include credit card company logo
Product Page Strategies
Never take people away from the product page
Highlight reviews
Use different reviews on different domains
Put detailed information "below the fold"
ACTION ITEM
Pick 2-3 of the strategies in this lesson and apply them to your product page.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
